name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit positions itself as an experience intelligence platform combining data science, AI analytics, and CX consulting under one PE-backed umbrella. Their methodology centers on integrating behavioral data with operational experience signals to drive predictive CX outcomes. Sub-brands Profusion and Amplify Analytix deliver GenAI-powered analytics with a strong financial services and retail vertical focus. Thought leadership leans heavily into data-driven personalization and AI-augmented journey optimization. Delivery model is hybrid consulting plus managed analytics services across EU and India.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta specializes in SAP-native Qualtrics experience management integrations, building custom dashboards and analytics layers that embed XM data directly into SAP workflows. Their methodology bridges operational data (O-data) with experience data (X-data) through tailored UI/UX solutions. AI stance focuses on intelligent analytics within SAP ecosystems rather than standalone AI products. Delivery model is project-based consulting with strong DACH enterprise customer base. Thought leadership centers on making experience data actionable within existing SAP infrastructure.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the leading Qualtrics-powered CX consultancy in the GCC region, specializing in government and public sector experience transformation. Their methodology centers on CX maturity assessments, citizen experience measurement, and national-level experience strategy design aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 and similar government initiatives. AI approach focuses on Qualtrics-native text analytics and predictive modeling for citizen feedback. Delivery model combines strategic advisory with Qualtrics implementation and managed services. Thought leadership themes include public sector CX benchmarking and digital government experience.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX leverages its global research infrastructure to deliver enterprise-scale customer experience measurement, loyalty analytics, and experience ROI frameworks. Their methodology is research-first, combining large-scale survey programs with behavioral analytics and competitive benchmarking. AI stance integrates Medallia platform capabilities with proprietary predictive analytics models. Delivery model is a hybrid of managed research services, strategic advisory, and technology-enabled measurement programs. Thought leadership consistently addresses loyalty economics, CX-to-financial performance linkage, and consumer behavior trends.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a Qualtrics Platinum Partner focused on enterprise XM program design, implementation, and optimization primarily in the US market. Their methodology emphasizes operationalizing experience data through Qualtrics platform best practices, advanced survey design, and CX program governance frameworks. AI stance leverages Qualtrics-native AI capabilities including Text iQ, Stats iQ, and Predict iQ for actionable insights. Delivery model is full-lifecycle Qualtrics consulting from strategy through implementation and managed services. Thought leadership themes include XM maturity acceleration, employee experience integration, and CX program ROI measurement.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in experience management program design and implementation across UK and EU enterprises. Their methodology focuses on Qualtrics platform optimization, CX and EX program design, and data-driven experience improvement. AI stance relies on Qualtrics-native analytics capabilities. Delivery model is consulting and implementation services with a boutique, high-touch approach. Thought leadership has been relatively quiet in recent periods with limited content output.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spanish-origin CX and EX consultancy operating across Iberoamerica with a strong emphasis on human-centered experience transformation. Their methodology integrates customer journey mapping, Voice of Employee programs, and organizational culture change into unified experience strategies. AI stance appears secondary to their consulting-first approach, focusing more on strategic frameworks than technology implementation. Delivery model is management consulting with deep expertise in workforce transformation and hybrid work models. Thought leadership themes span employee experience, leadership development, and customer-centric organizational design.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is the leading CX consultancy in the Spanish-speaking world, operating across 15+ countries with Qualtrics-certified implementation capabilities. Their methodology combines strategic CX advisory with VoC program design, journey mapping, and experience measurement frameworks. AI approach leverages Qualtrics platform analytics for text analysis and predictive insights within Spanish-language deployments. Delivery model spans strategic consulting, Qualtrics implementation, and managed CX measurement services. Thought leadership consistently addresses CX maturity models, digital experience transformation, and customer-centric strategy for Latin American and Iberian enterprises.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant's Connected Experiences Studio positions CX within the broader context of enterprise digital and AI transformation. Their methodology is technology-engineering-first, building custom digital experiences through design thinking, data engineering, and AI-powered personalization at scale. AI stance is aggressive, with generative AI and machine learning deeply embedded in their service delivery across all studios. Delivery model is large-scale engineering and consulting engagements with global delivery centers. Thought leadership from the CX studio specifically is sparse, with most content flowing through Globant's corporate AI and technology channels.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all tracked channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all tracked channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Digital footprint remains non-existent across all tracked channels. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canadian/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program strategy and implementation. Their methodology focuses on designing and scaling experience management programs for large enterprises, with notable case studies in technology (CrowdStrike), airline (WestJet), and gaming/government (OLG) sectors. AI stance leverages Qualtrics-native analytics and AI capabilities. Delivery model is strategic consulting combined with hands-on Qualtrics implementation. Thought leadership is primarily delivered through Qualtrics partner channels and conference participation rather than owned content.
